tools.name: MCP Official Registry
tools.description: The official centralized metadata repository for publicly accessible MCP servers, backed by Anthropic, GitHub, PulseMCP, and Microsoft. API freeze at v0.1.

tools.name: MCP.so
tools.description: Community-driven MCP marketplace with 18,900+ servers collected. Central directory for discovering, sharing, and learning about MCP servers.

tools.name: PulseMCP
tools.description: Daily-updated directory of 12,480+ MCP servers with popularity signals, visitor metrics, and official/community tags.

tools.name: Glama
tools.description: MCP hosting platform and curated directory with 9,000+ servers. Provides quality scorecards, one-click deployment, isolated VMs, and observability.
tools.target_audience: Developers and enterprises needing hosted MCP

tools.name: Smithery
tools.description: MCP registry, CLI, and managed runtime platform. Handles running MCP servers on Smithery infrastructure with real-time LLM endpoint connectivity.
tools.target_audience: Developers building and consuming MCP servers

tools.name: Awesome MCP Servers (punkpeye)
tools.description: GitHub-hosted curated collection of MCP servers, synced with mcpservers.org web directory. One of the largest community-maintained lists.

tools.name: LobeHub MCP Marketplace
tools.description: Comprehensive MCP marketplace integrated with LobeChat, featuring tools, resources, and prompts.

tools.name: Official MCP TypeScript SDK
tools.description: Official TypeScript SDK for building MCP servers and clients. Current version v1.27.1.

tools.name: Official MCP Python SDK
tools.description: Official Python SDK for MCP. Current version v1.26.

tools.name: mcp-go
tools.description: Community Go implementation of MCP with backward compatibility across multiple spec versions.

tools.name: Official Go SDK (x/tools/internal/mcp)
tools.description: Official Go SDK for MCP, currently unstable and subject to breaking changes.

tools.name: Speakeasy
tools.description: Platform that generates production-ready MCP servers from OpenAPI specifications. Also generates SDKs, docs, and Terraform providers.
tools.pricing: Free tier; Paid plans for teams

tools.name: Stainless
tools.description: Generates MCP servers from OpenAPI specs as a subpackage within TypeScript SDKs.

tools.name: FastMCP
tools.description: High-level Python framework for building MCP servers with automatic tool generation from type hints, docstrings, and OpenAPI specs.

tools.name: MCP Inspector
tools.description: Official interactive developer tool for testing and debugging MCP servers. React UI + Node.js proxy.

tools.name: MCPJam Inspector
tools.description: Enhanced MCP inspector for testing ChatGPT apps, MCP ext-apps, and MCP servers with full widget emulator and LLM chat.

tools.name: Docker MCP Inspector
tools.description: Docker's fork of the MCP Inspector for visual testing of MCP servers within Docker environments.

tools.name: MCPevals
tools.description: Node.js package and GitHub Action for evaluating MCP tool implementations using LLM-based scoring across accuracy, completeness, relevance, clarity, and reasoning.
tools.target_audience: MCP server developers wanting quality assurance

tools.name: MCPcat
tools.description: Analytics tool showing what agents are doing on your product and where they get stuck. OTEL-based telemetry forwarding.
tools.target_audience: Teams running MCP servers in production

tools.name: Sentry MCP Monitoring
tools.description: Protocol-aware visibility into MCP server usage, broken down by transport, performance, tools, and resources.

tools.name: Datadog MCP Server
tools.description: Bridge between Datadog observability data and AI agents supporting MCP, providing structured access to monitoring insights.

tools.name: Moesif MCP Observability
tools.description: API analytics platform with MCP server observability integration for monitoring usage patterns and performance.

tools.name: MCP OAuth Gateway
tools.description: OAuth 2.1 Authorization Server that adds authentication to any MCP server without code modification. Uses GitHub as identity provider.

tools.name: MCP Auth Proxy
tools.description: OAuth 2.1/OIDC authentication proxy for MCP servers supporting Google, GitHub, Okta, Auth0, Azure AD, and Keycloak.

tools.name: Kong AI MCP OAuth2 Plugin
tools.description: Kong gateway plugin securing MCP traffic using OAuth 2.0, ensuring only authorized clients access MCP servers.

tools.name: Azure API Management for MCP
tools.description: Azure APIM as authentication gateway for MCP servers, enabling enterprise-grade security for remote MCP deployments.

tools.name: Runlayer
tools.description: MCP security startup ($11M seed) providing all-in-one gateway with threat detection, observability, permissions, and enterprise development.
tools.target_audience: Enterprise teams deploying MCP at scale

tools.name: HyprMCP Gateway
tools.description: MCP OAuth Proxy with dynamic client registration, prompt analytics, and MCP firewall for enterprise-grade servers.

tools.name: Composio
tools.description: Agentic integration platform providing unified MCP gateway to 500+ managed integrations with OAuth handling, audit logs, and framework support.

tools.name: Pipedream MCP
tools.description: Access to MCP servers for 3,000+ APIs with 10,000+ prebuilt tools through Pipedream's integration platform.

tools.name: MintMCP
tools.description: Enterprise MCP gateway with one-click deployment, OAuth protection, and SOC 2 Type II compliance with audit-ready logs.

tools.name: Lunar.dev MCPX
tools.description: Enterprise MCP gateway prioritizing governance and granular RBAC with immutable audit trails for multi-tenant SaaS.

tools.name: MCPCore
tools.description: No-code MCP server builder. Describe tools in plain language, AI generates code/parameters, test instantly, one-click deploy.

tools.name: Latenode MCP
tools.description: MCP server builder combining custom code flexibility with visual builder. 500+ integrations, JavaScript support, AI Builder.

tools.name: Flow (No-Code MCP Studio)
tools.description: No-code MCP Studio for vibe-coding MCP servers via chat, publishing to GitHub, and deploying on Flow Cloud.

tools.name: Mintlify MCP Generator
tools.description: Generates MCP servers from documentation and OpenAPI specifications. Limited to OpenAPI spec input.

tools.name: @mcpm/cli
tools.description: MCP package manager CLI for searching, installing, and managing MCP server configuration.

tools.name: MCP Manager
tools.description: Platform focused on MCP deployment management, security best practices, and enterprise guidance.
